//: TypeScript config for the Vite pipeline files. `vite.config.ts` runs in
Node during builds, so it needs Node types and the ES2023 lib (Vite 8
targets Node 22+). We include the two config files it imports directly
so TypeScript sees them as pipeline members (they'd be picked up
transitively too, but listing them makes the boundary explicit and
lets `tsc -p tsconfig.node.json` typecheck them without needing the SPA
Files under `src/config/*.config.ts` that DO have runtime deps (React,
browser APIs) stay OUT of this include — they're compiled by
`tsconfig.json` alongside the rest of the SPA.
